title: Tobar 10351 Classic Jokes Fart Whistle
features: There's no point denying it: from childhood onwards, farts are funny.
Human ingenuity has produced numerous ways to replicate the characteristic sound and one method is the Fart Whistle.
Small enough to be hidden in a pocket and then stealthily produced when the occasion calls for it.
Part of the Classic Jokes range.
description: Product Description Tobar 10351 CLASSIC JOKES FART WHISTLE, There's no point denying it: from childhood onwards, farts are funny! Human ingenuity has produced numerous ways to replicate the characteristic sound and one method is the Fart Whistle, Small enough to be hidden in a pocket and then stealthily produced when the occasion calls for it, 11cm, Part of the Classic Jokes range. Box Contains 1X Tobar 10351 CLASSIC JOKES FART WHISTLE
